result.summary: Found several visual issues, mainly missing/unclear call-to-action text and overlapping elements near the bottom of the promo area.

issues.description: The yellow pill-shaped button in the top-right header appears blank, with no visible label or icon. This makes the primary action unclear.
issues.suggestion: Add visible text such as “Log In,” “Join Now,” or the intended CTA, and ensure it has sufficient contrast against the yellow background.

issues.description: The “SCROLL DOWN” overlay overlaps the small legal disclaimer text near the bottom of the yellow promo section, making the disclaimer difficult to read.
issues.suggestion: Move the scroll prompt higher or lower, reduce its size, or add spacing so it does not cover required legal copy.

issues.description: The legal disclaimer text is extremely small and low-density, making it nearly unreadable on mobile, especially with other elements layered over it.
issues.suggestion: Increase the font size and line height for legal text, or provide a clearly accessible expandable terms section.

issues.description: The top hero BetRivers logo card appears visually clipped at the top by the header area, with only the lower rounded corners visible.
issues.suggestion: Add top spacing or adjust the hero positioning so the logo card is fully visible and intentionally framed.

issues.description: The bottom fixed navigation visually competes with the promotional content and the scroll prompt, creating a crowded bottom area.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the bottom nav has clear separation from page content and avoid placing floating prompts directly above it.
